name: Setup Project Structure
description: Create necessary files: App.tsx, styles.css. Ensure index.html exists with correct meta tags.

name: Build Premium UI Components
description: Design glass container, input field with icon, task list items with round checkboxes, delete buttons, and empty state.

name: Implement Core Functionality
description: Add, delete, toggle tasks. Integrate localStorage for persistence. Handle edge cases.

name: Polish Interactions & Responsiveness
description: Add smooth CSS transitions, hover effects, focus states, and ensure mobile-friendly layout.
